Hero.title: Agile B Darija:
Hero.slogan: Agility as a Way of Life
Hero.description: The Moroccan hub for Agile practitioners, students, and leaders to collaborate, learn, and grow.

About.title: About Us
About.description: Agile B Darija is a Moroccan community dedicated to making Agile methodologies accessible to everyone through education in Darija, hands-on practice, and social impact.
About.missionDesc: Empower the Moroccan Agile community by providing free, accessible education in Darija and creating opportunities for collaboration, experimentation, and professional growth.
objectivesList: Democratize Agile knowledge by offering free formations in Moroccan Darija
Build a strong network of Agile practitioners across Morocco
Create social impact through community-driven Agile projects
Bridge the gap between Agile education and industry needs

valuesList.title: Collaboration
valuesList.desc: We believe in the power of community and collective intelligence.

valuesList.title: Inclusion
valuesList.desc: Everyone is welcome regardless of background or experience level.

valuesList.title: Continuous Learning
valuesList.desc: We grow together through practice, feedback, and iteration.

valuesList.title: Social Impact
valuesList.desc: Agile can and should be a force for positive change in society.

valuesList.title: Excellence
valuesList.desc: We strive for quality in everything we do — from formations to community events.

Activities.title: Our Activities
Activities.description: Discover the pillars that drive our community forward.

social.title: Social Impact & Associative Framework
social.desc: We leverage Agile methodologies to drive social change through associative projects, community initiatives, and partnerships with non-profit organizations.

practice.title: Practice & Experimentation
practice.desc: Hands-on workshops, hackathons, and real-world projects where members apply Agile principles in a safe, collaborative environment.

community.title: Community & Culture
community.desc: A vibrant ecosystem of Agile enthusiasts sharing knowledge, experiences, and best practices through regular meetups and discussions.

entrepreneurship.title: Entrepreneurship
entrepreneurship.desc: Supporting Agile-driven entrepreneurship through mentorship, networking, and resources for building startups and innovative projects.

history.title: Past Activities
history.desc: A look back at the formations, events, and initiatives we've delivered.

Features.description: Empowering the Moroccan Agile community through collaboration, education, and real-world impact.

culture.title: Community Culture
culture.desc: A vibrant space where Agile enthusiasts connect, share experiences, and build lasting relationships.

practice.title: Practice & Experimentation
practice.desc: Hands-on workshops, sprints, and real-world projects to sharpen your Agile skills through practice.

impact.title: Social Impact
impact.desc: Leveraging Agile methodologies for social good through associative projects and community initiatives.

network.title: Professional Network
network.desc: Connect with industry leaders, find mentors, and discover career opportunities in the Agile ecosystem.

Formations.title: Our Formations
Formations.description: Choose the formation that suits you and start your learning journey with us.
Formations.certifiedDesc: Get officially certified in Agile methodologies. Our certified program is coming soon — register your interest and be the first to know.
Formations.historyDesc: Replay and review formations we've already delivered.
Formations.requestDesc: Don't see what you're looking for? Let us know what topic you'd like us to cover.

agile-darija.title: Agile B Darija
agile-darija.desc: Learn Agile and Scrum in Moroccan Darija. Understand how teams work with speed and efficiency.

mindset.title: Mindset & Soft Skills
mindset.desc: Develop your personality and mindset to benefit your professional life. Communication, leadership, and time management.

teamwork.title: Agile Teamwork
teamwork.desc: Learn how to work with your team successfully. Workshops and practical exercises to understand team dynamics.

design-thinking.title: Design Thinking
design-thinking.desc: Problem-solving skills in a creative way. Learn how to think like a designer to find innovative solutions.

Team.title: Our Experts
Team.description: Meet the passionate experts driving the Agile B Darija community forward.
